source_intake_record.raw_question_text: An electron gun creates a beam of electrons moving horizontally with a speed of \( 3.3\times10^{7}\,\mathrm{m/s} \). The electrons enter a gap between two parallel electrodes with a electric field. By what angle, is the electron beam deflected by these electrodes?
